data.title: Apple's In-House Modems, Foldable iPhones, And Tim Cook On Cupertino's Future: This Week In Appleverse
Jeff Bezos Advocates Growth, Trump's Tariff Threats, And The Fed's Latest Moves: This Week In Economics
data.description: This week saw major economic discussions, with Jeff Bezos advocating for growth over cost cuts to tackle national debt, Donald Trump's tariff proposals raising trade war concerns, Goldman Sachs warning of economic risks from tariffs, the Federal Reserve hinting at a potential rate cut, and a surprisingly strong U.S. job market in November.

'Rethermalized' Burgers And A $30M Dream: RoboBurger Lands $1.5M Shark Deal After Selling 12,000 Burgers In Beta
Intel Stock Is Where It Was 27 Years Ago: How The World's Leading Chipmaker Lost The Plot, Thrice
data.description: Intel Corp. (NASDAQ: INTC) stock has plummeted by over 56% YTD due to losing ground in chip market to rivals like AMD, Nvidia, Qualcomm.
